prompt: Every time I do a weekly review with Warren, he generates a nice spending breakdown but I have to scroll through the chat to find the numbers. I've done this like 4 sessions in a row now. Can we make this a proper dashboard?

assertions.description: Recommends creating TASKS.md as a dedicated task/priorities file separate from MEMORY.md
Mentions /start and/or /update command pattern for the dashboard
References keeping Warren's existing Tokyo Night styling / dashboard.html as the style source
Explains how weekly review output connects to the dashboard
Recognizes 4 recurring sessions = skill gap, mentions creating a skill or command
